'''Liok''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Ciutric sector/Legends|Ciutric sector]] in [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], where archaeologists discovered the [[Shadow Traproom]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1stm}}
